question.text: In case of multiple settlements on the same day (e.g., around holidays), CCs and depositories shall follow:

answer.text: A strict time schedule to ensure all settlements are completed on the same day
Normal settlement timelines with no urgency
Settlement of only the most recent trades
Postponement of earlier settlements to the next day

explanation.text: **The Logic:** CCs and depositories must follow strict time schedules to complete all settlements on the same day when multiple settlements coincide. **The Trap:** No settlement is postponed - all must be completed sequentially on the same day. **Cross-Exam Context:** Holiday settlement logistics test understanding of operational settlement processes. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Members must plan liquidity carefully when multiple settlements fall on the same day.
